examples: The dog looked up at her appealingly.
His hand pulled Mary's gently and he turned his tired eyes on her appealingly.
He looked appealingly, first at one and then another of the lords about him, and tears came into his eyes.
Russell is appealingly brash until a bogus subplot forces him to suggest borderline psychosis.
She has run a gruelling, appealingly down-to-earth campaign, driving around the state in her now-famous red Ford pick-up.
